title: chore: update app metrics 2026-07-14
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt: Daily automated update of app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse

gist.headline: The greenhouse got counted
gist.blurb: The garden ledger has its daily refresh: app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse notes are back in step. Even the digital seedlings appreciate a good inventory.
gist.summary: Updated apps/APPS.md and apps/GREENHOUSE.md with the automated 2026-07-14 app metrics, health-check results, and greenhouse status.
gist.impact: Community maintainers have a current snapshot of listed apps and their greenhouse health.
gist.visual_concept: A cozy community garden ledger update: Polly checks a clipboard beside labeled code-plants while a small CRT monitor robot reads fresh health indicators from a terminal. The scene represents routine app monitoring and a well-tended greenhouse rather than a new product capability.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly, the cute yellow-and-brown striped bee mascot with pink cheek blush, light blue wings, and a tiny gardener visor, checking an app-health clipboard in a greenhouse of code-plants while a chunky CRT monitor robot displays tidy green check marks. Prominent lime green (#ecf874) leaves and terminal glow, warm cream and lavender pastels, soft lighting, cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes.
